Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to analyze the event log data for anomalies and undesirable behaviors The user wants us to identify anomalies hypothesize causes and propose SQL queries to investigate

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First look at the normal flow Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Compare with actual events per case id

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 follows normal flow exactly No anomaly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 events Register Order Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Issue Invoice Receive Payment next day

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods happen before Credit Check and Stock Validation This is a violation of normal process order Also Credit Check and Stock Validation occur after shipment which is risky

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Possible causes system error allowing premature shipment policy violation perhaps priority order But order type is priority Still credit check should be performed before shipment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 events Register Order Perform Credit Check Ship Goods Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Ship Goods happens before Confirm Shipment should be after Also Confirm Shipment occurs after Ship Goods which is illogical Additionally there is no Validate Stock event Missing activity Also Invoice issued before Confirm Shipment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Possible causes system logging order wrong human error or process bypass

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 events Register Order Receive Payment Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Ship Goods

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Receive Payment before Issue Invoice normal is Invoice then Payment Also Receive Payment is the second activity way too early Also no Credit Check no Validate Stock Confirm Shipment has shipment scheduled N but Ship Goods still happens later

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible causes fraud system error Payment maybe for something else Order value matches Could be a prepayment scenario But normal process does not include that Also Credit Check missing

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Other anomalies In case 1002 resource LogisticsMgr 2 does Confirm Shipment early In case 1003 LogisticsMgr 2 does Confirm Shipment late Could be same person causing issues

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses Process order violations sequence errors Missing required activities Activities performed by wrong role Temporal anomalies activities happening too quickly or too slowly Resource behavior certain resources repeatedly causing anomalies Order type correlation priority orders might have different flow

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: One query find cases where Confirm Shipment occurs before Perform Credit Check Use self joins on event log with different activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Another find cases where Ship Goods occurs before Confirm Shipment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Another find cases missing Validate Stock or Perform Credit Check

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Also find cases where Receive Payment occurs before Issue Invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Also check for duplicate activities Not seen Query to find resources involved in anomalies We can also compute time gaps between activities
